messages.sedparties.config.loadfail: Load not successful because preset is invalid or of a different version.
messages.sedparties.config.loadfailv: Try loading a file instead or copy a preset of a version >= 1.0.0
screen.sedparties.tooltip.posmenu.title: Edit Frame Position/Scale
screen.sedparties.tooltip.posmenu.desc: Opens a menu that allows you to adjust each frame's scale and position.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.presetmenu.des:
This will reset ALL YOUR PRESET DATA, IRREVERSIBLY.
Useful if another mod with support has been added, or the render frames seem broken.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.closemenu.desc: Close the menu and go back to the previous menu.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.mainmenu.title: Open Party Settings
screen.sedparties.tooltip.mainmenu.desc: Displays the party settings menu for the parties mod.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.default.title: Reset Frame
screen.sedparties.tooltip.default.desc: Resets both the scale and the position of the selected frame.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.countup.title: Increase Entity Count
screen.sedparties.tooltip.countup.desc:
Increases the fake entity amount for the selected frame.
This system helps to test padding of frames that can have multiple entities, like the party list.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.countdown.desc:
Lowers the fake entity amount for the selected frame.
This system helps to test padding of frames that can have multiple entities, like the party list.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.grid.title: Toggle Grid
screen.sedparties.tooltip.grid.desc: Toggles a grid display to help with alignment of the party UI.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.mdown.title: Move Frame Down
screen.sedparties.tooltip.mdown.desc: Hold SHIFT to move the frame by %s units instead.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.mup.title: Move Frame Up
screen.sedparties.tooltip.mleft.title: Move Frame Left
screen.sedparties.tooltip.mright.title: Move Frame Right
screen.sedparties.tooltip.accept.title: Accept Frame
screen.sedparties.tooltip.accept.desc:
Accepts the frame's current position and scale and goes back to the previous menu.
NOTE: The frame is still bounded by the screen.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.scaleup.title: Increase Size
screen.sedparties.tooltip.scaleup.desc: Increases the scale of the selected frame.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.scaledown.desc: Decrease the scale of the selected frame.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.cycle.title: Cycle Frames
screen.sedparties.tooltip.cycle.desc:
Cycles through each frame as if you clicked on it.
Helpful if one frame is somehow out of bounds and not clickable.
screen.sedparties.tooltip.anchor.title: Toggle Anchors
screen.sedparties.tooltip.anchor.desc:
Toggle the anchor buttons.
These anchor buttons allow you to offset the position of a frame by binding it to a specific area of the screen.
messages.sedparties.command.kickfail: Only the party leader can kick other players.
messages.sedparties.api.coldsweatunload: Cold Sweat needs to be version 2.3-b03c or higher! Support has been disabled.

messages.sedparties.phandler.noinviteper: Only the party leader can invite other players
messages.sedparties.phandler.changeleade: You are now the party leader.
messages.sedparties.phandler.kickedfromp: You have been kicked from the party.
%s has been kicked from the party.
gui.sedparties.tooltip.hoverlink: Click to copy preset to clipboard.
gui.sedparties.tooltip.linkpaste: Click here to run the command /applypreset, which loads a preset from your clipboard.
gui.sedparties.tooltip.linkpastedesc: Click to load preset from clipboard.
messages.sedparties.preset.loadsuccesscl: Preset from clipboard has been loaded successfully.
messages.sedparties.preset.loadfailclipb: Could not load a valid preset from the clipboard.

messages.sedparties.command.syncsame: Your stage sync is already set to [%s].
messages.sedparties.command.syncoverride: Note: Server sync is set to [%s]. Your selected option of [%s] will be overwritten.
messages.sedparties.command.serversyncch: Server sync mode has been changed to [%s].
messages.sedparties.command.serversyncsa: The server's sync setting is already set to [%s].
messages.sedparties.disabled.ftbteams: Party management is currently disabled. Use FTB Teams to create parties!
messages.sedparties.phandler.gamestagesy: Click an option to sync game stages:
messages.sedparties.crash.message: Element #%s caused an %s. It has been disabled.
messages.sedparties.crash.name: error
messages.sedparties.crash.click: Click to Copy Error to Clipboard
messages.sedparties.help.m1: §7This mod provides §6Frames§7 with §einformation§7 about your §eplayer & party§7. It shows things like §6health, armor, potion effects,§7 and §6more.§r
messages.sedparties.help.m2: §7It also adds a §6party system§7 with the §6/party§7 command with §eparty features§7 like §6XP sharing§7 and §6more.§r
messages.sedparties.help.m3: §7You can §6modify§7 the §eposition, scale,§7 and even §elook§7 of §6each frame§7 by §6pressing§7 §e[%s§e]§7 - a §6button§7 appears to the §eleft of the hotbar§7.§r
